technical: Changelog page: removed the release-cadence timeline strip (deleted the ReleaseCadence component); it aged poorly as versions and dates piled up.

Two-tier release cards: user-impact notes (translated) plus a native <details> collapsible for developer-facing technical detail (English, language-neutral, kept in the spine not the 24 locale files).

Per-version GitHub link is gated on an explicit `sbom` spine flag — only the releases that actually carry an sbom.spdx.json asset — so the link never over-promises an SBOM nor points at a tag with no release.
Security badge shown on releases flagged as hardening; dropped a redundant title attribute that duplicated the badge's visible label.
Repository italia/pa-webinar made public after a clean git-history secret scan; SiteSetting.githubUrl set so the per-version release/SBOM links resolve.
rnnoise noise-suppression flag moved from build-time-inlined to a runtime read (lib/jitsi/rnnoise); production values keep it enabled, preventing a silent regression on deploy.
i18n: 664 missing keys completed across 22 locales; a parity test now guards the whole catalogue (keys + ICU placeholders), not just the consent namespaces.

CI stopped rendering green on untested code: recorder, recorder-controller and the AI worker (pytest) now run in CI (were in no pipeline); coverage provider installed with a measured floor; Dependabot extended to the previously-uncovered images.

Chat attachments: after two gate attempts flagged in review (a durable token leaking into the URL, then a self-signed token bypassing live event status), reverted to the documented capability-URL; a cookie-scoped ACL is on the roadmap.
Brand asset kit + Open Graph/social preview wiring via a shared lib/seo with a guarded metadataBase (a malformed NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL no longer 500s the site).
Release CI fixed: the SBOM step no longer fails on the org artifact-storage quota, so GitHub Releases (with SBOM) are created again.
